questions.question: This down-to-earth A-lister famously tripped up the stairs when accepting the Academy Award for Best Actress.
Millennials have never used a paper map thanks to this technology available to consumers in the early 2000s.
What rockin' country band, founded in 1999, was comprised of Gary LeVox, Joe Don Rooney, and Jay DeMarcus?
This doctor was convicted on March 26, 1999, of second degree murder for assisting in the suicide of at least 130 people.
In 2004, Oprah gave each member of her studio audience a new Pontiac G6, and pop culture got this new phrase.
questions.answer: "YOU get a car! And YOU get a car!"
